content: propose_joint_activity(activity_name="Coffee Chat with Aaron", message="Hey Aaron, how's it going? I've been thinking a lot about my play and would love to hear your perspective. Can we grab a coffee sometime this week?", proposal="I'd really appreciate your perspective on my play. It's been tough to make progress, and I think your insights could help me see things differently. I'm open to any time that works for you this week.", invited_persons=["Aaron Whitfield"], time="Y2020-W03-activity-D2", location="Corner Coffee Shop", required_participants=["Aaron Whitfield"])

contact(message="Hey Aaron, I've been thinking a lot about our conversations and how they've helped me with my play. Would you be free on D2 or D4? Let me know what works for you.", to="Aaron Whitfield")

propose_joint_activity(activity_name="Rooftop Brainstorm", message="How about we meet at the rooftop on D2? It's one of my favorite spots to think through stories. I've been working on some ideas for my novel and could use the distraction.", proposal="I've been working on some ideas for my novel and could use the distraction of a conversation. The rooftop is a great place to brainstorm and get some fresh air.", invited_persons=["Adrian Morales"], time="Y2020-W20-activity-D2", location="Rooftop", required_participants=["Adrian Morales"])
